title: vicia parvula
intro: Vicia parvula, also known as the small vetch or little vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vicia parvula include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Vicia parvula is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or taken as supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
